fields.description: Master switch for the Jun 9 process-automation suite: Closed-Won SMS alerts, the won-but-unconverted reminder, Payment Received alerts, the PRO-0204 hand-off step engine, contract generation, and the Sales Pipeline board. OFF = the system behaves as it did before (silent timestamps still accumulate so the boards are meaningful from day one when enabled). Server behavior changes immediately; desk buttons/pages update on each user's next page load. Always-on regardless of this switch: the Lead quick-entry dialog and Opportunity field descriptions (form-level fixtures), and the Task Dashboard block (only appears where explicitly added to a Workspace).
fields.label: Enable Process Automation Suite

fields.description: Item Group the consumables picker on Maintenance Records is limited to (e.g. "Service"). Leave empty to allow any stock item.
fields.label: Consumables Item Group

fields.description: Last-resort source warehouse for consumables on Maintenance Records, used when neither the contract feature's warehouse nor the technician's vehicle warehouse is set.
fields.label: Default Consumables Warehouse

fields.description: The Item whose Serial Nos represent customer water features. Drives the Serial No pickers on Sales Orders and Maintenance Contracts.
fields.label: Water Feature Item

fields.description: Master switch for Google-Docs-style live form editing. Changes apply on collaborators' next page load — no deploy needed.
fields.label: Enable Live Collaborative Editing

fields.description: Doctypes with live collaborative editing. Before adding one, audit its form scripts for field-change handlers with side effects — they re-run on every collaborator's screen when remote values arrive (see the checklist in public/js/collab/live_form_sync.js).
fields.label: Collaborative Doctypes

fields.description: Employees texted (via the Triton gateway) when an Opportunity is marked Closed Won, and reminded daily about won opportunities still awaiting a Project. Numbers come from each Employee's Cell Number — no number stored here.
fields.label: SMS Recipients

fields.description: The daily reminder lists Closed Won opportunities that still have no Project after this many hours. Set 0 to disable the reminder entirely.
fields.label: Unconverted Reminder After (Hours)

fields.description: Opportunities sitting in a stage this many days turn amber on the Sales Pipeline board.
fields.label: Stale After (Days, Amber)

fields.description: Opportunities sitting in a stage this many days turn red and pulse on the Sales Pipeline board.
fields.label: Very Stale After (Days, Red)

fields.description: The Finance person responsible for Accounts Receivable hand-off steps (accounting project + invoice, payment receipt). Step notifications and overdue escalations for those steps go to this Employee.
fields.label: Accounts Receivable Rep
